summary.description: Distilled summary of what the agent accomplished or attempted. Pre-1.13.0 artifacts uncapped.

concerns.description: Any reservations or open questions. Pre-1.13.0 artifacts uncapped.

test_files.description: test-author role: test files written, for orchestrator-scoped gate runs.

test_ids.description: test-author role: individual test names/IDs added.

token_usage.description: Token self-report: the most recent usage figure the harness surfaced to the agent in-band (e.g. a token-budget system warning), or null when none appeared. A lower bound (it predates the agent's final response), never an estimate. Used by the orchestrator as a fallback when the completion result carries no usage figure. Optional for back-compat with returns written before 1.11.0.
